name: 凯文·艾伦·赫斯
name_full: 凯文·艾伦·赫斯 Kevin Allan Hess

last_movies.title: 小丑回魂：欢迎来到德里镇 第一季

introduction: Kevin was born in Burlington, Ontario, Canada, raised on Waterdown, Ontario, Canada. Kevin is a Native American, Bear foot Onondaga of Six Nations. Kevin has been acting for 7 years He had roles in: It Chapter Two, Designated Survivor season 2, Night Raiders, SEE, Dark Side of The Ring, Acknowledgement We Were Always There, Search Out The Land Documentary, Lead guitarist in the YouTube music video "Missing You So Bad Clara's Song". Paranormal Survivor Season 5, Kevin has had roles in other films, commercials and television shows..
